---
title: "Module 5: Visualization Best Practices"
toc: true
toc-location: left
---

How to choose the right chart and communicate data clearly.

## Match Chart to Question

| Question | Chart type |
|----------|------------|
| Distribution | Histogram, boxplot |
| Trend over time | Line chart |
| Comparison | Bar chart |
| Relationship | Scatter plot |
| Composition | Stacked bar, pie (sparingly) |

## Labeling and Annotation

- Always label axes with units
- Add a clear title that states the insight, not just the variable
- Annotate outliers or key events directly on the chart

## Tools

- **Python:** matplotlib, seaborn, Altair, Plotly
- **R:** ggplot2
- **Quarto:** renders all of the above inline
